# Pitch Deck Template

## Overview

Standard structure for BrainSAIT investor and customer pitch decks.

---

## Slide Structure

### Slide 1: Title
- Company name and logo
- Tagline
- Presenter info

### Slide 2: Problem
- Healthcare challenge
- Market pain points
- Cost of status quo
- Quantify the problem

### Slide 3: Solution
- BrainSAIT approach
- Key capabilities
- Differentiation
- Visual demo

### Slide 4: Product
- Platform overview
- Key features
- Agent capabilities
- Screenshots/demo

### Slide 5: Market
- Market size (TAM/SAM/SOM)
- Growth rates
- Key trends
- Saudi focus

### Slide 6: Business Model
- Revenue streams
- Pricing model
- Unit economics
- Path to profitability

### Slide 7: Traction
- Customer metrics
- Revenue growth
- Key wins
- Testimonials

### Slide 8: Competition
- Market landscape
- Differentiation
- Competitive advantages
- Defensibility

### Slide 9: Team
- Founders
- Key hires
- Advisors
- Why us

### Slide 10: Ask
- Funding amount
- Use of funds
- Milestones
- Contact info

---

## Design Guidelines

### Visual
- Clean, minimal design
- Consistent branding
- High-quality images
- Clear charts

### Content
- One idea per slide
- Few words, big impact
- Tell a story
- Practice delivery
